name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skylence multi-LLM marketplace: core baseline and soloterm agent-org plugins for Grok, Claude, Codex, Antigravity.

plugins.name: core-grok
plugins.description: Opinionated Grok baseline: /core-grok:setup seeds ~/.grok/judge-rules.json and writes the core guidelines (Advisor, Decisive Thinking, Coding, Review Mindset, Writing + compaction survival) into ~/.grok/AGENTS.md. Ships Grok-native judge-hook (PreToolUse), writing-guard, research-nudge Stop hook. Uses GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT with Claude alias fallbacks.

plugins.name: soloterm-agent-org-grok
plugins.description: Skylence agent-org v2 for Grok. Bundles the Solo MCP server (board/PTY/timer substrate) + orchestrator, planner (max-effort grounded plans), solo-worker, replacer, org-audit skills, capacity-check gate, build-slot serializer, ghost-probe, capacity-probe scripts. Includes session-discipline hooks adapted for Grok (lane marking, conduct refresh, stop gate).
